title: Enchanted Golden Apple Custom Recipe
description: Adds back the recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple, but modifies it so it's less farmable.
body:
# 🍎 Description
Adds a new recipe, intended to be harder to mass-produce than the one removed in 1.9. The recipe contains diamonds, which take time to be mined and can't be mass-produced with a gold farm, but aren't so rare it would defeat the purpose of installing this datapack. Also, diamonds are already used in an enchanting table, so they would work great as a magic item here.

# 🕑 Versions
Supports Java Edition from 1.14 to 1.21.11. Available as a datapack or a mod. **DATAPACK USERS: Early versions don't support new pack format ranges. Since I'm not going to make a separate version of the pack for every single Minecraft update, please ignore the "made for a newer version of Minecraft".**

# 🛠️ The Recipe
![The new recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed68d13021526f93a9fe45a7da0d40d0f1e09879.png)
